'''''Pizzazz'' 3''' is the third issue in the [[Marvel Comics]] popular culture monthly magazine. This issue was cover-dated [[December]] [[1977]] and featured the continuation of the serialized ''[[Star Wars]]'' comic ''[[The Keeper's World]]''.<ref name="Issue 3" />
